# Karo Livestock

> Premium European livestock and meat export from Latvia to Iraq, Kurdistan and Middle East.

## About

Karo Livestock exports live cattle, sheep, goats, fresh and frozen meat from Europe (Latvia) to Iraq, Kurdistan Region, and the wider Middle East. EU certified, halal-ready, competitive pricing.

## Contact

- Phone / WhatsApp: +37127700121
- Email: karanubeshop@gmail.com
- Location: Riga, Latvia, European Union
- Languages: English, Arabic, Kurdish, Latvian

## Products

- Live cattle (Holstein, Simmental, Limousin)
- Live sheep and lambs (Merino, Texel)
- Live goats (Boer, Nubian, Alpine)
- Fresh and frozen beef, lamb, veal
- Poultry (chicken, turkey, duck)
- Custom orders welcome

## Key Facts

- EU veterinary certified exports
- Halal-compliant documentation available
- End-to-end logistics including customs clearance
- Delivery to Iraq, Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Jordan, Turkey
- Arabic and Kurdish speaking team
